race.description: Happy Mother's Day - Cameron Crockett Racing Hcp (C3)
race.comment: DITTERICH (1) continues to knock on the door. Never stopped trying last start at Wagga when grinding away gamely for third on a track that proved hard to make ground on. Doesn't have to improve much on the short turnaround to get the job done this time. BOLO MISS (11) has been rock solid for the Lynch camp this campaign. Impressed two back at Dubbo when a barnstorming CL1 winner. Not as effective last time over the 900m at Wellington but will appreciate the extra 200m this time. Watch for her bursting through. BOUNDING BON (5) got the job done at Wellington last time out and has to be included on the back of that effort. TURBULENT (10) returned with a bang and with improvement expected, he can go on with the job.
